creator: itojun@itojun.org
text:
I've modified tiff34 port, since I needed it for hylafax 4.0p1.
tiff34 is said to be incompatible with tiff33, so I've changed
installation path so that there's no collision.

archive can be found at
ftp://jaz.jp.freebsd.org/pub/incoming/ports-jp/graphics/tiff34-ports2.tar.gz
